Case studies

AI-enabled improvements across real business workflows

Education

Manual lead follow-up and inconsistent content planning.

  • Designed an AI-assisted inquiry workflow and monthly campaign calendar.
  • Faster response time and stronger lead nurturing.

Local Services

Low visibility and unclear digital positioning.

  • Built an SEO-led content strategy with AI research support.
  • Clearer messaging and more qualified website traffic.

Ecommerce

Slow product campaign creation.

  • Created reusable prompt systems for product copy, email, and ads.
  • Higher content output with consistent brand voice.
